problems.why_it_matters: This node is reporting an explicit editor/runtime error state.
problems.likely_impact: The graph may fail to compile or behave incorrectly at runtime.
problems.suggested_fix: Open the graph, inspect the node error, and fix the broken connection, invalid reference, or missing asset.

problems.why_it_matters: The editor is warning that something may be misconfigured or suboptimal.
problems.likely_impact: Usually not fatal, but may hide a setup issue or weak pattern.
problems.suggested_fix: Inspect the warning in the Blueprint editor and decide whether to fix or intentionally keep it.

problems.why_it_matters: The editor is warning that something may be misconfigured or suboptimal.
problems.likely_impact: Usually not fatal, but may hide a setup issue or weak pattern.
problems.suggested_fix: Inspect the warning in the Blueprint editor and decide whether to fix or intentionally keep it.

problems.why_it_matters: Domain-specific content identifiers appear embedded directly in graph logic.
problems.likely_impact: Scaling content may require graph edits instead of data-only changes.
problems.suggested_fix: Move identifiers into data assets, DataTables, config assets, or authored metadata.

problems.why_it_matters: This pattern may reduce readability, scalability or runtime safety.
problems.likely_impact: May increase maintenance cost or hide runtime bugs.
problems.suggested_fix: Review this graph and refactor if the pattern is confirmed.
